---
title: "\'Diplomate on the Fall of the First Empire, A\' (Author not named)"
---

## \'Diplomate on the Fall of the First Empire, A\' (Author not named)

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** Not reprinted in volume form

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
